@graph.description: Rosmarinic acid is a caffeic-acid ester abundant in rosemary, lemon balm, perilla, and other Lamiaceae herbs. It is most convincing as an anti-inflammatory and mast-cell-modulating compound, but isolated-compound human evidence remains thin.
@graph.name: rosmarinic acid
